subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My servant who soared in the atmosphere of his Lord, the All-Merciful's love, with spirit and sweet fragrance, and whom the attraction of the Call did seize [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدی الذی طار فی هوآء محبه ربه الرحمن بالروح و الریحان و اخذه جذب الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
